services.title: Septic Tank Pumping

services.title: System Inspections
services.description: Find problems before they become disasters. Full system check and honest assessment.

services.title: Drain Field Repair
services.description: When the leach field fails, we diagnose the issue and fix it properly.

about.heading: Real septic pros answering the phone
about.body: We're the New Haven septic team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one truck, one bill.
